identity.name: Shieka
identity.otherProficiencies: light armor, simple weapons, pact weapon (any)

attacks.name: Eldritch Blast
attacks.notes: 1d10 force per beam, 2 beams at lvl 5, 120 ft
attacks.extra: with Agonizing Blast: +CHA mod to dmg per beam (CHA -1 here, no boost)

attacks.name: Pact Weapon
attacks.extra: summon as action, counts as magic for resistances

attacks.name: Magic Wand
attacks.notes: +5 damage on hit, -3 to atk rolls (homebrew)

spells.name: Eldritch Blast
spells.desc: ranged spell atk, 1d10 force, 120 ft, +1 beam at 5/11/17

spells.name: Mage Armor
spells.desc: AC 13 + DEX (free via Armor of Shadows, no slot)

spells.name: Exploding Skulls
spells.desc: 8d6 fire 20 ft sphere, DEX save DC 10 for half. Slow flight, easier to dodge (DM ruling)

features.name: Pact Magic
features.desc: Slots restore on short rest. All slots cast at the highest level you've unlocked (3rd at lvl 5).

features.name: Agonizing Blast
features.desc: Add CHA mod to damage of each Eldritch Blast beam. Currently -1, useful when CHA goes positive.

features.name: Armor of Shadows
features.desc: Cast Mage Armor on yourself at will, no slot, no components.

features.name: Pact of the Blade
features.desc: Summon a magical weapon as an action; counts as magic; can change form when summoned.

features.name: Patron
features.desc: Pick a Patron (Fiend / Archfey / Great Old One / Hexblade / Celestial / Fathomless / Genie). Adds a 1st-lvl feature, an expanded spell list, and more at lvl 6/10/14.

homebrew:
Magic Wand: +5 damage on hit, -3 to attack rolls.

Exploding Skulls: same damage as Fireball (8d6 fire, DEX save half), but slow flight time means targets can react. DM ruling: advantage on the save, or DC -2.

HP: rolled hit dice were taken as flat averages (5 per d8 after 1st), not rolled.

Known spells need filling in: at lvl 5 Warlock knows 6 spells (any level you have slots for) plus 3 cantrips. Currently listed: Eldritch Blast, Mage Armor (free via Armor of Shadows), Exploding Skulls. Need 5 more spells + 2 more cantrips.

Patron not picked yet (Fiend / Archfey / Great Old One / Hexblade / Celestial / Fathomless / Genie). The patron grants extra features at lvls 1, 6, 10, 14 plus an expanded spell list.
